# Uruguay 2026 — Exploring the Koshas

> A public archive of yoga talks given by Satchidananda during his February 2026 tour of Uruguay. Each talk includes a full transcript, audio recording, and thematic synthesis — available in English, Spanish (Español), and Nepali (नेपाली).

Site: https://yogicapproach.com

## Content

This site contains:
- Transcripts of live yoga talks (AI-assisted, human-reviewed)
- Thematic syntheses of the talk series
- A Sanskrit/yogic-terms glossary (EN/ES/NE)
- Audio recordings for each event

All content is available in three languages: English (original), Spanish (AI-translated), and Nepali (AI-translated).

The primary subject area is the Pancha Kosha model — the five-layered map of the human being from yogic philosophy (Annamaya, Pranamaya, Manomaya, Vijnanamaya, Anandamaya Kosha) — along with related practices and texts from the Tantric tradition.

## Talks

- Feb 9, Escuela de Yoga Satyam — The Five Koshas: A Practical Framework for Wholeness
  EN: https://yogicapproach.com/en/events/2026-uruguay/20260209-koshas-escuela-de-yoga-satyam/
  ES: https://yogicapproach.com/es/events/2026-uruguay/20260209-koshas-escuela-de-yoga-satyam/
  NE: https://yogicapproach.com/ne/events/2026-uruguay/20260209-koshas-escuela-de-yoga-satyam/

- Feb 10, Clínica Vitola / Yoga Carrasco — Living Fully In Yourself
  EN: https://yogicapproach.com/en/events/2026-uruguay/20260210-living-fully-in-yourself-yoga-carrasco/
  ES: https://yogicapproach.com/es/events/2026-uruguay/20260210-living-fully-in-yourself-yoga-carrasco/
  NE: https://yogicapproach.com/ne/events/2026-uruguay/20260210-living-fully-in-yourself-yoga-carrasco/

- Feb 11, MACA Museum — The Levels of the Human Being According to Yoga and Their Dialogue with AI
  EN: https://yogicapproach.com/en/events/2026-uruguay/20260211-koshas-and-ai-maca/
  ES: https://yogicapproach.com/es/events/2026-uruguay/20260211-koshas-and-ai-maca/
  NE: https://yogicapproach.com/ne/events/2026-uruguay/20260211-koshas-and-ai-maca/

- Feb 18, SitaRam Darshan, La Paloma — Tantric Tools: Tantroktam Devi Suktam for Self-Reflection
  EN: https://yogicapproach.com/en/events/2026-uruguay/20260218-tantroktam-devi-suktam-la-paloma/
  ES: https://yogicapproach.com/es/events/2026-uruguay/20260218-tantroktam-devi-suktam-la-paloma/
  NE: https://yogicapproach.com/ne/events/2026-uruguay/20260218-tantroktam-devi-suktam-la-paloma/

- Feb 23, Piriápolis — The Koshas: A Map of the Inner World
  EN: https://yogicapproach.com/en/events/2026-uruguay/20260223-koshas-piriopolis/
  ES: https://yogicapproach.com/es/events/2026-uruguay/20260223-koshas-piriopolis/
  NE: https://yogicapproach.com/ne/events/2026-uruguay/20260223-koshas-piriopolis/
